sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30536" key="e)gxarakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγχᾰρ-ακτέον</orth>, <sense id="n30536.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must scarify</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
